message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.0→0.2.2 and update transitive deps

Upgrade asupersync to 0.2.2 which includes poisoned-mutex safety fixes
in broadcast/pool Drop paths, cancel-safety fixes in websocket split
halves, lost-wakeup race fix in ChannelSink::poll_ready, and aggregator
drain-on-gap-reset improvements. Also picks up windows-sys 0.59→0.61
across transitive dependencies (arboard, dirs-sys, filetime, rustix,
tempfile).

- Cargo.toml: asupersync 0.2.0 → 0.2.2 (both [dependencies] and [dev-dependencies])
- Cargo.lock: regenerated with updated checksums and transitive bumps

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

- "windows-sys 0.59.0",

 ]
